title: Ensure all advisors have initialized findings-log.jsonl files
perceive: Architecture_oversight advisor lacks a findings-log.jsonl file. This file is critical for recording and tracking historical architecture scan results. Without it, findings are ephemeral.
execute: 1. Create findings-log.jsonl template in reference/ directory documenting the schema for advisor findings.
2. Audit all advisor directories to ensure findings-log.jsonl exists.
3. Add findings-log.jsonl initialization to the engineering-advisor template so new advisors have it by default.
verify: All advisors in WAI-Spoke/advisors/ have a findings-log.jsonl file. Engineering-advisor template includes findings-log.jsonl initialization.
acceptance_criteria: findings-log.jsonl exists in all advisor directories
